title: Session Manifest
description: Session manifest (session.json) — the master index for a Builder session. Always loaded into context. Must stay under 5KB. Lives at docs/sessions/{date}-{short-id}/session.json.

sessionId.description: Unique session identifier matching the folder name (e.g., 2026-03-08-a1b2c3)

lastHeartbeat.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last activity. Used to detect abandoned sessions.

mode.description: Whether this session originated from a PRD or an ad-hoc request

source.description: Origin information — fields populated depend on mode

prdId.description: PRD identifier (e.g., prd-auth-system). Set in prd mode.

prdFile.description: Path to PRD file relative to project root. Set in prd mode.

taskId.description: Task identifier (e.g., task-2026-03-01-fix-header). Set in adhoc mode.

description.description: Brief description of the work (user request summary)

branch.description: Git branch for this session's work

analysisCompleted.description: Whether Phase 0 analysis was shown and user approved with [G]. MUST be true before any @developer delegation. Survives compaction because it lives on disk.

currentChunk.description: ID of the chunk currently being worked on (e.g., US-002-02-login-flow). Null if no chunk is active.

currentAction.description: Current action context for compaction recovery. Updated on every tool call. Replaces currentTask from builder-state.json.

description.description: Short summary of the action in progress

contextAnchor.description: Pointer to where to resume (file path, section, or step)

implementationDecisions.description: Design decisions made during analysis (from Phase 0). Keys are decision IDs, values are the chosen option. Preserved from builder-state.json for compaction resilience.

chunks.description: All work chunks in execution order. Each entry is lean — full detail lives in the chunk folder. UI todos are derived from this array.

storyId.description: Story identifier (e.g., US-001 for PRD, TSK-001 for ad-hoc)

summary.description: 1-2 sentence description of what was accomplished. Filled on chunk completion. Always loaded into memory — gives Builder awareness of completed work without reading chunk folders.

status.description: Current processing status. Maps to UI todo status: pending→pending, in_progress→in_progress, completed→completed, failed→failed, skipped→cancelled

startedAt.description: When work on this chunk began

commitHash.description: Git commit hash for this chunk's commit. Null if not yet committed.
